title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: ### Findings (why thin decks still pass) 1. **Prep gate is fail-open on quality warnings.** `checkArtifacts()` marks `ready` from `errors.length === 0` only, so warning-class thinness signals do not block routing. Refs: [orchestrator-adapter.js#L926](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L926), [orchestrator-adapter.js#L927](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L927), [orchestrator-adapter.js#L1057](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1057) 2. **`deck-spec` validation enforces shape, not substance.** It validates allowed enums and upper bounds, but no minimum explanatory payload. `max_bullets: 0` and `body_density: sparse` are valid. Refs: [orchestrator-adapter.js#L49](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L49), [orchestrator-adapter.js#L703](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L703), [orchestrator-adapter.js#L710](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L710), [deck-spec.json#L19](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/deck-spec.json#L19) 3. **Evidence policy is count-based, not claim-criticality-based.** Current gate only requires anchor count / footer ratio, not “major claim slides must be visibly anchored.” So key slides can remain `footer-only`. Refs: [orchestrator-adapter.js#L807](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L807), [orchestrator-adapter.js#L812](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L812), [deck-spec.json#L33](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/deck-spec.json#L33), [asset-plan.json#L16](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/asset-plan.json#L16) 4. **Render path is decoupled from prep contracts.** `run-slide-delivery` accepts only `content.json`; it does not require `deck-spec/asset-plan/workflow-decision`, so prep gates are bypassable at runtime. Refs: [run-slide-delivery.js#L41](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L41), [run-slide-delivery.js#L82](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L82), [run-slide-delivery.js#L163](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L163) 5. **Native inspection gate checks technical integrity, not content richness.** `verify-slides` only checks placeholders and very-short slide text (<5 chars), so semantically薄い but non-empty slides pass. Refs: [verify-slides.js#L223](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L223), [verify-slides.js#L247](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L247) 6. **Observed proof in current deck: PASS with minimal-content warning.** The inspection report is `PASS` while containing `MEDIUM empty-slide`. Refs: [inspection-report.json#L28](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/inspection-report.json#L28), [inspection-report.json#L31](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/inspection-report.json#L31), [inspection-report.json#L40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/inspection-report.json#L40) 7. **Nanobanana handoff also lacks deck-spec enforcement.** Manus prompt is built from `content` only; no input schema for `deck-spec`/`asset-plan`, so per-slide density intent is not hard-constrained. Refs: [manus-slide-generator.js#L112](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-slide-generator.js#L112), [manus-slide-generator.js#L218](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-slide-generator.js#L218), [manus-slide-generator.js#L279](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-slide-generator.js#L279) --- ### Likely weak contract fields - `deck-sp...
